description: Story structure: Goals (WHY+WHAT) → Implementations (HOW) with prereqs, ADRs, and backlogs for multi-session AI-assisted development. Beads adapter.

story_description.description: WHY this story matters and WHAT it delivers

steps.title: {{story_id}}: EDA — understand the problem space
steps.description: Exploratory data analysis / research before writing any code. Understand the current state, establish baselines, identify constraints.
steps.acceptance: Problem space is understood. Key metrics baselined. Constraints documented. Ready to define goals.

steps.title: {{story_id}}: Goal 1 — define after EDA
steps.description: WHY: to be defined after EDA. WHAT: to be defined after EDA.
steps.acceptance: To be defined. Use INVEST criteria: Independent, Negotiable, Valuable, Estimable, Small, Testable.

steps.title: {{story_id}}: Implementation 1 — define after goal
steps.design: HOW: to be defined. Include technical approach, files to modify, testing strategy.

steps.title: {{story_id}}: Goal 2 — define after EDA
steps.description: WHY: to be defined after EDA.

bond_points.description: Bond additional goals to this story
